originalTitle: PufferLib RL dev with Joseph Suarez
title: Comparing Maze Performance Across Puffer 4 and 5 Branches
summary: Compared maze environment performance between Puffer 4 and 5 branches, finding a slight improvement in Puffer 5. Merged the maze changes from the 5 branch into 4 to prepare for Puffer 5 development. Also sketched the core algorithm for Puffer 5, which uses setable state to generate on-policy data from high-advantage states.
